text: Being here, I feel a peculiar sense of anticipation mixed with mystery. The dim, blue-lit corridor and the abstract 'R+D' sign hint at innovation and experimentation. Yet, there is an emptiness to the space—a stillness that heightens my awareness of my own presence. It feels as though something is about to be discovered, but I am the only witness in this quiet, almost sacred environment dedicated to creation and thought. I am simultaneously curious and a little disoriented, as though on the edge of a new idea.
